contentList.content: (Granny Rings) Moonlit grin returns, knot and tale bind sea and hearth, bones remember skill.
(Granny Rings) Forged circle of fate, Maps the dance of blade and bow, Once clumsy, now swift.

A comprehensive list of Granny's Rings

Love Granny, xoxoxoxoxo
(Granny Rings) Rapid hands align, Automated steps, logs fly, Release ticks nearer.
(Granny Rings) Dusty spine whispers, Pages turn like secret moons, Granny's rings will glow.
(Granny Rings) Warm circle on skin, teaching hands with silent law, practice turns to art.
(Granny Rings) Bronze circle whispers, teaches heavy steel the dance, wide arcs cut the air.
(Granny Rings) Silver ring, snug fit, lessons bloom beneath its glow, fingers find old truths.
(Granny Rings) Ring on finger gleams, teaches swing and measured stance, giant edge obeys.

(Granny Rings) Ring cool on my palm, metal murmurs of old skill, blade finds its true beat.

Rage how you want to rage. This ring comes stacked with 3 rage charges and all the rages. If Branded, unlock Endless Rage.
This ring comes stacked with 3 rage charges and all the rages.
Using this will clean off dirt, blood, and face-paint of yourself and all allies withing [1]. It also will remove Stench.
Animate Dead doesn't require a corpse in this area due to a lingering necrotic stench.
Rejuvenating Miasma allows you to animate the dead without a corpse.
Applies a condition that reflects all incoming projectiles back at their source.

Drop a bliss bomb with a radius of [1] for [2] turns. Targets will be Seized by great joy, affected entities are more energized and also more mentally compliant. Entities are also vulnerable to Psychic damage. Does not affect self or allies.
Does not affect self and allies.
This aura gives you and those around you the Steeped in Bliss condition. Heightens emotion in those who stand within a [1] radius of you.
Affects self and everyone within the aura's radius.
Bliss others or yourself or both.
(Granny Rings) Cold band on my hand, Resonance stone wakes the pulse, Power threads through bone.
You are tagged as a Sorcerer with Wild Magic guaranteed. You also get stacked with 3 Sorcery Points.
You do not need to be a Sorcerer to use this ring.
(Granny Rings) Finger wraps the void, Chaos blooms like dark petals, Stars shift off their charts.

Wearing this ring gives you: (1) Proficiency with all weapons, armors and shields. (2) Resistance to all tpes of damage, including fall damage. (3) AC +3. (4) Roll Bonus 1d4 to Melee and Ranged attacks for both weapons and spells. (5) Unamred attacks get +2 roll bonus and +2 to damage. (6) Advantage on all abilities. (7) Can not be disarmed. (8) Spell Save +3. (9) Party Bath spell to keep you and your friends tidy.

under weight of endless sky,

(Granny Rings) Snow-hushed shadows creep, Poison laced in silent frost, still heart dares to beat.
(Granny Rings) Evening shadows fall, Ki breathes through the rustling leaves, Heart finds its quiet.
(Granny Rings) Molten veins aglow, a fearless dance with fury, earth's primeval breath.
(Granny Rings) Mountain stands tall, Cool rain rinses weary stones, New strength rises fresh.
(Granny Rings) Twilight’s last embrace, Lightning scars the fading dusk, Night’s hush follows close.
(Granny Rings) Eternal flames rise, Ice caps hum a frozen song, Balance glows so nice.
(Granny Rings) Tadpoles dart swiftly, on shifting waters—time holds, both fins and feet at once.
(Granny Rings) Fluttering wings gleam, Moonlight dances on soft winds, Night breathes silver dreams.
(Granny Rings) Moving shadows flow, Endless whispers in the dark, Mystery unwinds.
(Granny Rings) Thick mud holds each step, earth slows beneath weary feet, spring bids us persist.
(Granny Rings) Tranquil knowing grows, Sparkling streams whisper secrets, Peace in evening's glow.
(Granny Rings) Rain quenches the earth, swift droplets race down the pane, fresh scent fills the air.
(Granny Rings) Twinkling abyss, endless whispers of cosmos, pause beneath my grasp.
(Granny Rings) Golden harvest shines, wealth unmeasurable deep, endless streams of gold.
(Granny Rings) Rough tree bark stands tall, silence whispers secrets deep, time’s forging unyield.
(Granny Rings) Blood-kissed sunset, pleasure and pain intertwine, the moon sighs fulfilled.
(Granny Rings) Fists clash in anger, drizzle soothes the scorching rage, boot meets stone silence.
(Granny Rings) Windswept stone fortress, force of ages worn away, shimmering moonlight.
(Granny Rings) Searing blast splits air, crimson rivers stain the earth, silence swells with pain.
(Granny Rings) Flames lick the dry air, allergic stars in night's hold, world shrinks unseen.
(Granny Rings) Morning glory blooms, Barrels stand silent and still, Dawn whispers farewell.
(Granny Rings) Golden notes arise, Bard's tale weaves through ember glow, Festival delights.
(Granny Rings) Golden leaves whisper, wealth drifts with the autumn breeze, change paints the old new.
(Granny Rings) Moonlight softly glows, Stillness whispers healing light, Peace within unfolds.
(Granny Rings) Soft winter snow falls, tadpole sleeps beneath deep ice, dreams of spring’s warmth bloom.
(Granny Rings) Golden sunrise, wealth unfolds in open hands, new seeds take root.
(Granny Rings) Stone flung afar, ripples stir the quiet pond, spring whispers anew.
(Granny Rings) Drowning in colors, A palette swirls, endless hues, Paralyzed by light.
(Granny Rings) Fluttering near, golden rings inside the bag, wings whisper goodbyes.
